actuals.note: No history.json found — no hours logged yet this week (Jul 20–26)

recommendation.summary: All categories at zero, and this is the first week back on SF's normal rhythm after the Ann Arbor stay ended — a good moment to re-establish the Bay Club habit rather than let the travel gap turn into a longer one. No new verified roles surfaced this cycle, so the highest-leverage professional move is applying to the invite-only ALIGN AI Executive Summit (Aug 19) now, since applications for director-level summits like this take longer to clear than a job application.

suggested.title: Apply to ALIGN AI Executive Summit San Francisco (Aug 19, invite application for director-level+ professionals)
Bay Club San Francisco — re-start the routine post-travel (open 5 AM daily)
San Francisco Art Book Fair — free, Thu Jul 23, 6–10 PM at Minnesota Street Project
